name: JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is a leading U.S.-based financial services firm with $4.4 trillion in assets and $362.4 billion in stockholders equity as of December 31, 2025. Operating under J.P. Morgan and Chase brands, it provides investment banking, consumer and small business financial services, commercial banking, financial transaction processing, and asset management to millions of customers and prominent corporate, institutional, and government clients globally.

products.name: Investment Banking
products.description: Advisory and capital markets services for corporate, institutional, and government clients globally.

products.name: Consumer & Community Banking (CCB)
products.description: Financial services and products for consumers and small businesses, primarily in the U.S.

products.name: Commercial & Investment Bank (CIB)
products.description: Wholesale banking, markets, and securities services for corporations and institutions.

products.name: Asset & Wealth Management (AWM)
products.description: Investment management and wealth management services for individuals and institutions.

products.name: Financial Transaction Processing
products.description: Processing of financial transactions for clients across various industries.
